stemHtml:
Refer to ALICANTE - Chart 10-3 from Jeppesen GSPRM 2017.
Departing on SID ASTRO 4A, you are cleared to FL180, with a restriction to maintain FL70 until passing ALT VOR. The aircraft climbs with an average ROC of 800 ft/min, and the ground speed is 133 kt. When will you reach the top of climb (ToC)? Approximately...
